name: 暗影双匕（★） | 噩梦之夜
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 噩梦之夜
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a night ops color scheme. It's the whisper of the wind... it's the bite at your neck
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把武器的部分零件以黑夜行动的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 疑是清风，却是封喉…
